title: Neatly Compatible
body:
Minecraft has always been split or difficult to run and always needing diffrent modpacks or for you to make your own on just to play, well this is the solution.
- Windows? yes.
- Linux? yes.
- livingroom pc? yes.
- Mobile? yes.
once people find a way to get the vulkan mod on vr then that too and once java runs on console those will work too.

_______________________________________
answering basic questions.
1. why vulkan and is there a GL version? vulkan cause for 2017 hardwear and up it runs better and for older hardwear there will be 2 versions, oldGL and GL.
2. why make this? I got tired of the game always being split.
3. why are some features missing? because this is a modpack and dependint on mod creators.
4. how can I use this on mobile? use a mobile launcher that allows you to browes mod packs, like: [https://github.com/FCL-Team/FoldCraftLauncher](https://github.com/FCL-Team/FoldCraftLauncher) or [https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher)
